chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-773 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.3184/2023 3. For hearing of main case 13-09-2023 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
